description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:git image with the docker:dind service and a before_script that logs into registry.gitlab.com with the CI token and into Docker Hub with $DOCKER_PASSWORD. Define two stages: build and sync. In the build stage add jobs build_centos, build_centos_devenv, build_fedora, build_fedora_devenv, and build_ubuntu that each run a docker build -t registry.gitlab.com/gbraad/c9ide:<tag> <context> followed by docker push registry.gitlab.com/gbraad/c9ide:<tag> (tags c7, c7-devenv, f27, f26-devenv, u1604 respectively). In the sync stage add jobs clone_centos, clone_fedora, and clone_ubuntu that each docker pull the corresponding registry image, docker tag it to gbraad/c9ide:<tag>, and docker push gbraad/c9ide:<tag>. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
